grass_path_2
https://polyhaven.com/a/grass_path_2

forest_ground_04
https://polyhaven.com/a/forest_ground_04

rocky_terrain
https://polyhaven.com/a/rocky_terrain

Downloaded at 1K resolution. Only diffuse JPG maps are redistributed in this
repository; normal, displacement, roughness, and preview files are omitted.
